title: woodsia scopulina subsp. laurentiana
intro: Woodsia scopulina subsp. laurentiana, also known as the Laurentian Woodsia fern, is a subspecies of the Woodsia scopulina plant, a type of fern native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Woodsia scopulina subsp. laurentiana include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to utilize its medicinal properties.
